meaning: n.非常轻的人或物,不重要者,最轻量级选手
examples: The other two members of the committee are just featherweight.
You become free, featherweight and empowered to lead the life you were meant to!
John is the other top featherweight. A win over him would propel him even closer to a fight against Lopez.
The super featherweight division is arguably the hottest in Britain at the present time.
Once perfected, the silk will be used for featherweight ballistic vests, medical sutures and artificial ligaments.
